name: @tootallnate/ff7-pc-model
description: Pure-JS parsers for Final Fantasy VII PC's bespoke 3D model formats: HRC skeleton hierarchies, RSD resource references, P-format (`.p`) binary meshes, and TEX (`.tex`) textures. Used by FF7 PC's character/battle/field models — and, as it turns out, by the FF7 Nintendo Switch port too (which ships the PC asset tree verbatim).
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
